goal: Restructure the user table schema with incompatible approaches
context: Python project with a database schema module. Two tasks independently redesign the user table structure in fundamentally different ways — one normalizes into multiple tables, the other denormalizes into a single wide table. These approaches are inherently incompatible.

tasks.title: Normalize user schema
tasks.goal: Split the user table into users and user_profiles tables with a foreign key relationship.
constraints: Use normalized form with separate tables
acceptance: get_user_table returns normalized schema with users and user_profiles

tasks.title: Denormalize user schema
tasks.goal: Flatten all user data into a single wide users table with profile columns inline.
constraints: Use denormalized form with single table
acceptance: get_user_table returns single table with all profile columns
